TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Nsgan Jin-ay(kari Klmukan o Jîn-ài-hiong)o ga mniq nklaan hidaw alang paru Nan-tu Taywang, kska alang nyusan Nan-tu o hiya ka tgkingal alang ga niqan seejiq tnpusu Taywang(kingal duri o alang nsgan Sin-i), mgtgut tgdaya nsgan Hu-ping paru Tay-cung, mgtgut alang nsgan B-su-ring alang paru Ka-ring-ku, mgtgut Hwa-reyn, tghunat nsgan Maribasi paru Hwa-reyn, mgtgut tghunat alang nsgan Sin-yi, mgtgut ryaxanhidaw nsgan Yu-ce, Pu-ri ni kwowsing. Knlbangan na o 1273 10kb tnxalun², kska alang paru Nan-tu ohiya ka llabang balay, kska kana alang nsgan bbkgan qpahan alang Taywang o alang nsgan Jin-ay nii o, hiya ka cigtru llabang bi. Babaw tnjyalan do hangan alang nsgan Jin-ay nii o pnyahan seuxal han. Pusu bi nniqan bnkgan mqapan alang o ga mniq U-se, ga mniq ska bi dgiyaq, alang nii o paru bi yama niya ni hrus bi ka nniqan dha, malu balay saan rmigaw ni qmita. Ga kska alang hiya ka seejiq na o, niqan Embgala ni Seejiq ni Bunun.Klwaan Nihung seuxal, wada muda paru balay tmjiyal Nihung siida kaseejiq Seejiq, kika niqan bi hangan'Musya jiking' endaan tmjiyal Nihung ksun, endaannii o kikamniq bi alang nsgan Jin-ay nii. 1950 hngkawas siida, smnegul thowlang Ku-ku-min-tu ka seejiq Ipaw, miyah thjil Cing-cing alang nsgan Jin-ay hini(kika alang Jung-sing sayang), mdrumut bi kmburah qmpahan ka dhiya nii, mhuma ana manu hiyi qhuni pnegalang, phiyug nanak alang dha, dhiya nii o kmgaaw mrata ni Seejiq na o pnaah Yun-nan Cyukuku hari kana, kska na hiya niqan ka seejiq tnpusu Pay-yi pnaah Yun-nan uri. Yaasa saw nii do alang nsgan Jin-ay o mumal hiya ka kndsan Pay-yi Yun-nan uri da. Kiya ni mtgimax alang Jing-ay ka lala klgan kndsan seejiq da. Ris Alang nsgan Jin-ay o llabang bi ka dxgal alang nii,brah nahan o ngalan dxgal nniqan tnpusu seejiq han, pusu nniqan mqeepah alang o mniq U se. 1930 hngkawas siida, tmjiyalmkan Nihung ka seejiq tnpusu Seejiq, kika Musya jiking'(endaan tmjiyal Nihung), wada pskluwi balay alang Taywang ni ana inu klwaan babaw dxgal. Babaw mhudu tmjiyal do, 1946 hngkawas 4 idas 1 jiyax do, ngalan alangnsgan paah hiya siida da, kiya ni pklwaan alang paru Tay-cung Ne-nkaw. Paah 1950 hngkawas 10 idas siida do, klwaan alang paru Nan-tu da. Muda kmpriyux hangan 2002 hngkawas siida, bukung alang nsgan Jin-ay Nan-tu o prajing muda dmudul kana alang kmpriyux hangan alang dha, dnngsan niya o tai saw pryuxun alang nsgan U-se ka alang nsgan Jin-ay nii. Duri ni, ga ska alang nsgan hiya ka maxal spat(Cwey-hwa, Ri-sing, Hwa-syang, Sin-seng, Hu-cu,Nan-hung, Ta-tung, Cun-yang, Cing-ying, Hu-cu, Cing-ay, Wan-hung, Hwa-ce, Cung-cen) alang bilaq nii o pryuxun hangan ida nkari hnici rudan seuxal msa. Kiya ka kiya ni yaasa hangan U-se seuxal o"Paran"ksun, duma na seejiq o ini sruwa priyux hangan U-se do ini uda ka endaan dha nii da. Ida bitaq sayang ida Jin-ay ka hangan nsgan alang nii. Pnegdxgal Knlbanagn alang nsgan Jin-ay o 1,273.5312 tnxalun², mglbu knlbangan alang paru Yun-ring, psdkaun kana alang nsgan Taywang o, hiya ka tgtru knpraan knlbangan na, pusu nniqan qmpah alang o ga mniq 1200 tnxalun yama baraw. Kiya ni 2013 hngkawas 3 idas 27 jiyax siida, daan lmglug 6.1 kmpraan runug ka alang Jin-ay nii, pusu runug nii o pklu bi mniq truma alang nsgan Jin-ay, qnrbqan na o 15.4 10kb tnxalun². Bnkgan qpahan alang Kana alang o niqan 16 ka alang bilaq Niqan spat bilaq alang ga mniq tgdaya alang bilaq Jung-sing(yayung Pi-rwi-si, alang Ce-yun, pngpung Sung-kang), ga mniq siyaw elug 8 kana, kska Ri-san ni Ta-yuring. alang bilaq Cwey-hwa(Cwey-rwan , Ma-ri-kwan/Ma-li-koan, Hwa-kang) alang bilaq Rising(Rising, Wangyang, Maripa / Malepa) alang bilaq Hwa-syang(Jwey-yeyn / Masitobaon, Hung-syang / Knazi, Ce-hung), tru alang bilaq nii o ga mniq siyaw elug Ri-sing kana, uusa dha qmpah qmpahan. Niqan dha bilaq alang ga mniq iyax tgdaya ryaxan hidaw(yayung Pa-kang-si) alang bilaq Sing-sen(Mey-yen / Baibalala/Bala, Hwey-swin saan tnqhuni) alang Hu-cu(Cung-yen / T-g-da-ya/ Nakahara, Cing-ryu /Cwan-cung-taw-se /Gluban) Niqan matarubilaq alang ga mniq ska alang bilaq Nan-hung(qhuni subus, tmay uusa qmita qhuni sudus, yayung Nan-san-si, Mey-si Tung-yen/Ton-gan, biyuk Jen-ce-kwan) alang bilaq Ta-tung(U-se / Pa-ran, Pi-hu, ptasan tgska laqi Jin-ay, Ru-dux/Dro-dux, Yu-se / Cing-cing-nung-cang, Sung-kang, Mey-hung / Ri-ying, Cwey-hung, I-hung, Kwen-yang, U-ring, Hehwansan) alang bilaq Cwen-yang(Ying-se/ Snu-wil, How-ke / Ho-go, Tru-wan, Ta-ru-wan / Ta-ro-wan) alang bilaq Cing-ying(Ru-san / Bow-a-lun, ulay Ru-san / Mhe-bu, Twen-yun / Tnbalah) alang bilaq Tu-da(Ping-cing / Tu-da/To-da, Ping-he / Lukug-daya) alang bilaw He-cow(Cing-kwan / Truku, Ping-sen / Truwan) Niqan spac bilaq alang ga mniq tghunat alang bilaq Cing-ay(Wan-ta, Sung-ring / Pulan, Aw-wan-ta) alang bilaq Wan-hung(Cwi-ping, Kan-cow-wan / Kantaban, Cyey-mey-yweyn) alang bilaq Hwa-ce(U-cyey / Vogai) alang bilaq Cung-cen(Ka-tu / Kwow-keng / Ka-du) Pnspuan seejiq Knpryuxan knhbragan seejiq hngkawas Kska kana alang nsgan Taywang o, alang nsgan Jin-ay nii ka cigtru knlala knhbragan seejiq n aka alang nii, mgtruma knhbragan seejiq alang paru Hwa-leyn alang nsgan B-su-ring ni alang paru Nan-tu alang nsgan Sin-i. Ttgsa Ptasan tgaraw laqi Pnhyugan klwaan patsan slhayan qmpah pnegalang Jin-ay Ptasan tgska laqi Pnhyugan alang paru Nan-tu ptasan tgska laqi Jin-ay Rgagan Turku pnhyugan klwaan saan rmigaw rnaaw saan rmigaw Hu-hwan-san pnhyugan klwaan rnaaw saan rmigaw Aw-wan-ta pnhyugan klwaan Cwey-hung, I-hung U-se tgliyan qsiya ulay Ru-san pnegalang Cing-cing pnegalang Mey-hung pnhiyug paru ptasan Tay-ta rnaaw Hwey-syun pnhyugan paru ptasan Sing-ta Tayal saan msangay ttgsa endaan mneudusalang paru Nan-tu saan kndamat endaan U-se Seejiq niqan bi hangan Mow-na Ru-daw-Klwaan Nihung siida, hiya o bukung kana alang Seejiq ka hiya, hiya o kika pusu bi dnnudul kana seejiq Seejiq mrmun bi tmjiyal Nihung.
S.PHON: nsgan ɟin-aj(kaɾi klmukan o ɟ*n-*i-ħioŋ)o ga mniq nklaan ħidaw alaŋ paɾu nan-tu tajwaŋ, kska alaŋ njusan nan-tu o ħija ka tgkiŋal alaŋ ga niqan səəɟiq tnpusu tajwaŋ(kiŋal duɾi o alaŋ nsgan sin-i), mgtgut tgdaja nsgan ħu-piŋ paɾu taj-ʦuŋ, mgtgut alaŋ nsgan b-su-ɾiŋ alaŋ paɾu ka-ɾiŋ-ku, mgtgut ħwa-ɾən, tgħunat nsgan maɾibasi paɾu ħwa-ɾən, mgtgut tgħunat alaŋ nsgan sin-ji, mgtgut ɾjaxanħidaw nsgan ju-ʦə, pu-ɾi ni kwowsiŋ. knlbaŋan na o **** **kb tnxalun*, kska alaŋ paɾu nan-tu oħija ka llabaŋ balaj, kska kana alaŋ nsgan bbkgan qpaħan alaŋ tajwaŋ o alaŋ nsgan ɟin-aj nii o, ħija ka ʦigtɾu llabaŋ bi. babaw tnɟjalan do ħaŋan alaŋ nsgan ɟin-aj nii o pnjaħan səuxal ħan. pusu bi nniqan bnkgan mqapan alaŋ o ga mniq u-sə, ga mniq ska bi dgijaq, alaŋ nii o paɾu bi jama nija ni ħɾus bi ka nniqan dħa, malu balaj saan ɾmigaw ni qmita. ga kska alaŋ ħija ka səəɟiq na o, niqan əmbgala ni səəɟiq ni bunun.klwaan niħuŋ səuxal, wada muda paɾu balaj tmɟijal niħuŋ siida kasəəɟiq səəɟiq, kika niqan bi ħaŋan'musja ɟikiŋ' əndaan tmɟijal niħuŋ ksun, əndaannii o kikamniq bi alaŋ nsgan ɟin-aj nii. **** ħŋkawas siida, smnəgul tħowlaŋ ku-ku-min-tu ka səəɟiq ipaw, mijaħ tħɟil ʦiŋ-ʦiŋ alaŋ nsgan ɟin-aj ħini(kika alaŋ ɟuŋ-siŋ sajaŋ), mdɾumut bi kmbuɾaħ qmpaħan ka dħija nii, mħuma ana manu ħiji qħuni pnəgalaŋ, pħijug nanak alaŋ dħa, dħija nii o kmgaaw mɾata ni səəɟiq na o pnaaħ jun-nan ʦjukuku ħaɾi kana, kska na ħija niqan ka səəɟiq tnpusu paj-ji pnaaħ jun-nan uɾi. jaasa saw nii do alaŋ nsgan ɟin-aj o mumal ħija ka kndsan paj-ji jun-nan uɾi da. kija ni mtgimax alaŋ ɟiŋ-aj ka lala klgan kndsan səəɟiq da. ɾis alaŋ nsgan ɟin-aj o llabaŋ bi ka dxgal alaŋ nii,bɾaħ naħan o ŋalan dxgal nniqan tnpusu səəɟiq ħan, pusu nniqan mqəəpaħ alaŋ o mniq u sə. **** ħŋkawas siida, tmɟijalmkan niħuŋ ka səəɟiq tnpusu səəɟiq, kika musja ɟikiŋ'(əndaan tmɟijal niħuŋ), wada pskluwi balaj alaŋ tajwaŋ ni ana inu klwaan babaw dxgal. babaw mħudu tmɟijal do, **** ħŋkawas * idas * ɟijax do, ŋalan alaŋnsgan paaħ ħija siida da, kija ni pklwaan alaŋ paɾu taj-ʦuŋ nə-nkaw. paaħ **** ħŋkawas ** idas siida do, klwaan alaŋ paɾu nan-tu da. muda kmpɾijux ħaŋan **** ħŋkawas siida, bukuŋ alaŋ nsgan ɟin-aj nan-tu o pɾaɟiŋ muda dmudul kana alaŋ kmpɾijux ħaŋan alaŋ dħa, dnŋsan nija o tai saw pɾjuxun alaŋ nsgan u-sə ka alaŋ nsgan ɟin-aj nii. duɾi ni, ga ska alaŋ nsgan ħija ka maxal spat(ʦwə-ħwa, ɾi-siŋ, ħwa-sjaŋ, sin-səŋ, ħu-ʦu,nan-ħuŋ, ta-tuŋ, ʦun-jaŋ, ʦiŋ-jiŋ, ħu-ʦu, ʦiŋ-aj, wan-ħuŋ, ħwa-ʦə, ʦuŋ-ʦən) alaŋ bilaq nii o pɾjuxun ħaŋan ida nkaɾi ħniʦi ɾudan səuxal msa. kija ka kija ni jaasa ħaŋan u-sə səuxal o"paɾan"ksun, duma na səəɟiq o ini sɾuwa pɾijux ħaŋan u-sə do ini uda ka əndaan dħa nii da. ida bitaq sajaŋ ida ɟin-aj ka ħaŋan nsgan alaŋ nii. pnəgdxgal knlbanagn alaŋ nsgan ɟin-aj o *,***.**** tnxalun*, mglbu knlbaŋan alaŋ paɾu jun-ɾiŋ, psdkaun kana alaŋ nsgan tajwaŋ o, ħija ka tgtɾu knpɾaan knlbaŋan na, pusu nniqan qmpaħ alaŋ o ga mniq **** tnxalun jama baɾaw. kija ni **** ħŋkawas * idas ** ɟijax siida, daan lmglug *.* kmpɾaan ɾunug ka alaŋ ɟin-aj nii, pusu ɾunug nii o pklu bi mniq tɾuma alaŋ nsgan ɟin-aj, qnɾbqan na o **.* **kb tnxalun*. bnkgan qpaħan alaŋ kana alaŋ o niqan ** ka alaŋ bilaq niqan spat bilaq alaŋ ga mniq tgdaja alaŋ bilaq ɟuŋ-siŋ(jajuŋ pi-ɾwi-si, alaŋ ʦə-jun, pŋpuŋ suŋ-kaŋ), ga mniq sijaw əlug * kana, kska ɾi-san ni ta-juɾiŋ. alaŋ bilaq ʦwə-ħwa(ʦwə-ɾwan , ma-ɾi-kwan/ma-li-koan, ħwa-kaŋ) alaŋ bilaq ɾisiŋ(ɾisiŋ, waŋjaŋ, maɾipa / maləpa) alaŋ bilaq ħwa-sjaŋ(ɟwə-jən / masitobaon, ħuŋ-sjaŋ / kna*i, ʦə-ħuŋ), tɾu alaŋ bilaq nii o ga mniq sijaw əlug ɾi-siŋ kana, uusa dħa qmpaħ qmpaħan. niqan dħa bilaq alaŋ ga mniq ijax tgdaja ɾjaxan ħidaw(jajuŋ pa-kaŋ-si) alaŋ bilaq siŋ-sən(mə-jən / baibalala/bala, ħwə-swin saan tnqħuni) alaŋ ħu-ʦu(ʦuŋ-jən / t-g-da-ja/ nakaħaɾa, ʦiŋ-ɾju /ʦwan-ʦuŋ-taw-sə /gluban) niqan mataɾubilaq alaŋ ga mniq ska alaŋ bilaq nan-ħuŋ(qħuni subus, tmaj uusa qmita qħuni sudus, jajuŋ nan-san-si, mə-si tuŋ-jən/ton-gan, bijuk ɟən-ʦə-kwan) alaŋ bilaq ta-tuŋ(u-sə / pa-ɾan, pi-ħu, ptasan tgska laqi ɟin-aj, ɾu-dux/dɾo-dux, ju-sə / ʦiŋ-ʦiŋ-nuŋ-ʦaŋ, suŋ-kaŋ, mə-ħuŋ / ɾi-jiŋ, ʦwə-ħuŋ, i-ħuŋ, kwən-jaŋ, u-ɾiŋ, ħəħwansan) alaŋ bilaq ʦwən-jaŋ(jiŋ-sə/ snu-wil, ħow-kə / ħo-go, tɾu-wan, ta-ɾu-wan / ta-ɾo-wan) alaŋ bilaq ʦiŋ-jiŋ(ɾu-san / bow-a-lun, ulaj ɾu-san / mħə-bu, twən-jun / tnbalaħ) alaŋ bilaq tu-da(piŋ-ʦiŋ / tu-da/to-da, piŋ-ħə / lukug-daja) alaŋ bilaw ħə-ʦow(ʦiŋ-kwan / tɾuku, piŋ-sən / tɾuwan) niqan spaʦ bilaq alaŋ ga mniq tgħunat alaŋ bilaq ʦiŋ-aj(wan-ta, suŋ-ɾiŋ / pulan, aw-wan-ta) alaŋ bilaq wan-ħuŋ(ʦwi-piŋ, kan-ʦow-wan / kantaban, ʦjə-mə-jwən) alaŋ bilaq ħwa-ʦə(u-ʦjə / *ogai) alaŋ bilaq ʦuŋ-ʦən(ka-tu / kwow-kəŋ / ka-du) pnspuan səəɟiq knpɾjuxan knħbɾagan səəɟiq ħŋkawas kska kana alaŋ nsgan tajwaŋ o, alaŋ nsgan ɟin-aj nii ka ʦigtɾu knlala knħbɾagan səəɟiq n aka alaŋ nii, mgtɾuma knħbɾagan səəɟiq alaŋ paɾu ħwa-lən alaŋ nsgan b-su-ɾiŋ ni alaŋ paɾu nan-tu alaŋ nsgan sin-i. ttgsa ptasan tgaɾaw laqi pnħjugan klwaan patsan slħajan qmpaħ pnəgalaŋ ɟin-aj ptasan tgska laqi pnħjugan alaŋ paɾu nan-tu ptasan tgska laqi ɟin-aj ɾgagan tuɾku pnħjugan klwaan saan ɾmigaw ɾnaaw saan ɾmigaw ħu-ħwan-san pnħjugan klwaan ɾnaaw saan ɾmigaw aw-wan-ta pnħjugan klwaan ʦwə-ħuŋ, i-ħuŋ u-sə tglijan qsija ulaj ɾu-san pnəgalaŋ ʦiŋ-ʦiŋ pnəgalaŋ mə-ħuŋ pnħijug paɾu ptasan taj-ta ɾnaaw ħwə-sjun pnħjugan paɾu ptasan siŋ-ta tajal saan msaŋaj ttgsa əndaan mnəudusalaŋ paɾu nan-tu saan kndamat əndaan u-sə səəɟiq niqan bi ħaŋan mow-na ɾu-daw-klwaan niħuŋ siida, ħija o bukuŋ kana alaŋ səəɟiq ka ħija, ħija o kika pusu bi dnnudul kana səəɟiq səəɟiq mɾmun bi tmɟijal niħuŋ.
S.FORM: Nsgan Jin-ay(kari Klmukan o Jîn-ài-hiong)o ga mniq nklaan hidaw alang paru Nan-tu Taywang, kska alang nyusan Nan-tu o hiya ka tgkingal alang ga niqan seejiq tnpusu Taywang(kingal duri o alang nsgan Sin-i), mgtgut tgdaya nsgan Hu-ping paru Tay-cung, mgtgut alang nsgan B-su-ring alang paru Ka-ring-ku, mgtgut Hwa-reyn, tghunat nsgan Maribasi paru Hwa-reyn, mgtgut tghunat alang nsgan Sin-yi, mgtgut ryaxanhidaw nsgan Yu-ce, Pu-ri ni kwowsing. Knlbangan na o 1273 10kb tnxalun², kska alang paru Nan-tu ohiya ka llabang balay, kska kana alang nsgan bbkgan qpahan alang Taywang o alang nsgan Jin-ay nii o, hiya ka cigtru llabang bi. Babaw tnjyalan do hangan alang nsgan Jin-ay nii o pnyahan seuxal han. Pusu bi nniqan bnkgan mqapan alang o ga mniq U-se, ga mniq ska bi dgiyaq, alang nii o paru bi yama niya ni hrus bi ka nniqan dha, malu balay saan rmigaw ni qmita. Ga kska alang hiya ka seejiq na o, niqan Embgala ni Seejiq ni Bunun.Klwaan Nihung seuxal, wada muda paru balay tmjiyal Nihung siida kaseejiq Seejiq, kika niqan bi hangan'Musya jiking' endaan tmjiyal Nihung ksun, endaannii o kikamniq bi alang nsgan Jin-ay nii. 1950 hngkawas siida, smnegul thowlang Ku-ku-min-tu ka seejiq Ipaw, miyah thjil Cing-cing alang nsgan Jin-ay hini(kika alang Jung-sing sayang), mdrumut bi kmburah qmpahan ka dhiya nii, mhuma ana manu hiyi qhuni pnegalang, phiyug nanak alang dha, dhiya nii o kmgaaw mrata ni Seejiq na o pnaah Yun-nan Cyukuku hari kana, kska na hiya niqan ka seejiq tnpusu Pay-yi pnaah Yun-nan uri. Yaasa saw nii do alang nsgan Jin-ay o mumal hiya ka kndsan Pay-yi Yun-nan uri da. Kiya ni mtgimax alang Jing-ay ka lala klgan kndsan seejiq da. Ris Alang nsgan Jin-ay o llabang bi ka dxgal alang nii,brah nahan o ngalan dxgal nniqan tnpusu seejiq han, pusu nniqan mqeepah alang o mniq U se. 1930 hngkawas siida, tmjiyalmkan Nihung ka seejiq tnpusu Seejiq, kika Musya jiking'(endaan tmjiyal Nihung), wada pskluwi balay alang Taywang ni ana inu klwaan babaw dxgal. Babaw mhudu tmjiyal do, 1946 hngkawas 4 idas 1 jiyax do, ngalan alangnsgan paah hiya siida da, kiya ni pklwaan alang paru Tay-cung Ne-nkaw. Paah 1950 hngkawas 10 idas siida do, klwaan alang paru Nan-tu da. Muda kmpriyux hangan 2002 hngkawas siida, bukung alang nsgan Jin-ay Nan-tu o prajing muda dmudul kana alang kmpriyux hangan alang dha, dnngsan niya o tai saw pryuxun alang nsgan U-se ka alang nsgan Jin-ay nii. Duri ni, ga ska alang nsgan hiya ka maxal spat(Cwey-hwa, Ri-sing, Hwa-syang, Sin-seng, Hu-cu,Nan-hung, Ta-tung, Cun-yang, Cing-ying, Hu-cu, Cing-ay, Wan-hung, Hwa-ce, Cung-cen) alang bilaq nii o pryuxun hangan ida nkari hnici rudan seuxal msa. Kiya ka kiya ni yaasa hangan U-se seuxal o"Paran"ksun, duma na seejiq o ini sruwa priyux hangan U-se do ini uda ka endaan dha nii da. Ida bitaq sayang ida Jin-ay ka hangan nsgan alang nii. Pnegdxgal Knlbanagn alang nsgan Jin-ay o 1,273.5312 tnxalun², mglbu knlbangan alang paru Yun-ring, psdkaun kana alang nsgan Taywang o, hiya ka tgtru knpraan knlbangan na, pusu nniqan qmpah alang o ga mniq 1200 tnxalun yama baraw. Kiya ni 2013 hngkawas 3 idas 27 jiyax siida, daan lmglug 6.1 kmpraan runug ka alang Jin-ay nii, pusu runug nii o pklu bi mniq truma alang nsgan Jin-ay, qnrbqan na o 15.4 10kb tnxalun². Bnkgan qpahan alang Kana alang o niqan 16 ka alang bilaq Niqan spat bilaq alang ga mniq tgdaya alang bilaq Jung-sing(yayung Pi-rwi-si, alang Ce-yun, pngpung Sung-kang), ga mniq siyaw elug 8 kana, kska Ri-san ni Ta-yuring. alang bilaq Cwey-hwa(Cwey-rwan , Ma-ri-kwan/Ma-li-koan, Hwa-kang) alang bilaq Rising(Rising, Wangyang, Maripa / Malepa) alang bilaq Hwa-syang(Jwey-yeyn / Masitobaon, Hung-syang / Knazi, Ce-hung), tru alang bilaq nii o ga mniq siyaw elug Ri-sing kana, uusa dha qmpah qmpahan. Niqan dha bilaq alang ga mniq iyax tgdaya ryaxan hidaw(yayung Pa-kang-si) alang bilaq Sing-sen(Mey-yen / Baibalala/Bala, Hwey-swin saan tnqhuni) alang Hu-cu(Cung-yen / T-g-da-ya/ Nakahara, Cing-ryu /Cwan-cung-taw-se /Gluban) Niqan matarubilaq alang ga mniq ska alang bilaq Nan-hung(qhuni subus, tmay uusa qmita qhuni sudus, yayung Nan-san-si, Mey-si Tung-yen/Ton-gan, biyuk Jen-ce-kwan) alang bilaq Ta-tung(U-se / Pa-ran, Pi-hu, ptasan tgska laqi Jin-ay, Ru-dux/Dro-dux, Yu-se / Cing-cing-nung-cang, Sung-kang, Mey-hung / Ri-ying, Cwey-hung, I-hung, Kwen-yang, U-ring, Hehwansan) alang bilaq Cwen-yang(Ying-se/ Snu-wil, How-ke / Ho-go, Tru-wan, Ta-ru-wan / Ta-ro-wan) alang bilaq Cing-ying(Ru-san / Bow-a-lun, ulay Ru-san / Mhe-bu, Twen-yun / Tnbalah) alang bilaq Tu-da(Ping-cing / Tu-da/To-da, Ping-he / Lukug-daya) alang bilaw He-cow(Cing-kwan / Truku, Ping-sen / Truwan) Niqan spac bilaq alang ga mniq tghunat alang bilaq Cing-ay(Wan-ta, Sung-ring / Pulan, Aw-wan-ta) alang bilaq Wan-hung(Cwi-ping, Kan-cow-wan / Kantaban, Cyey-mey-yweyn) alang bilaq Hwa-ce(U-cyey / Vogai) alang bilaq Cung-cen(Ka-tu / Kwow-keng / Ka-du) Pnspuan seejiq Knpryuxan knhbragan seejiq hngkawas Kska kana alang nsgan Taywang o, alang nsgan Jin-ay nii ka cigtru knlala knhbragan seejiq n aka alang nii, mgtruma knhbragan seejiq alang paru Hwa-leyn alang nsgan B-su-ring ni alang paru Nan-tu alang nsgan Sin-i. Ttgsa Ptasan tgaraw laqi Pnhyugan klwaan patsan slhayan qmpah pnegalang Jin-ay Ptasan tgska laqi Pnhyugan alang paru Nan-tu ptasan tgska laqi Jin-ay Rgagan Turku pnhyugan klwaan saan rmigaw rnaaw saan rmigaw Hu-hwan-san pnhyugan klwaan rnaaw saan rmigaw Aw-wan-ta pnhyugan klwaan Cwey-hung, I-hung U-se tgliyan qsiya ulay Ru-san pnegalang Cing-cing pnegalang Mey-hung pnhiyug paru ptasan Tay-ta rnaaw Hwey-syun pnhyugan paru ptasan Sing-ta Tayal saan msangay ttgsa endaan mneudusalang paru Nan-tu saan kndamat endaan U-se Seejiq niqan bi hangan Mow-na Ru-daw-Klwaan Nihung siida, hiya o bukung kana alang Seejiq ka hiya, hiya o kika pusu bi dnnudul kana seejiq Seejiq mrmun bi tmjiyal Nihung.
S.PHON: nsgan ɟin-aj(kaɾi klmukan o ɟ*n-*i-ħioŋ)o ga mniq nklaan ħidaw alaŋ paɾu nan-tu tajwaŋ, kska alaŋ njusan nan-tu o ħija ka tgkiŋal alaŋ ga niqan səəɟiq tnpusu tajwaŋ(kiŋal duɾi o alaŋ nsgan sin-i), mgtgut tgdaja nsgan ħu-piŋ paɾu taj-ʦuŋ, mgtgut alaŋ nsgan b-su-ɾiŋ alaŋ paɾu ka-ɾiŋ-ku, mgtgut ħwa-ɾən, tgħunat nsgan maɾibasi paɾu ħwa-ɾən, mgtgut tgħunat alaŋ nsgan sin-ji, mgtgut ɾjaxanħidaw nsgan ju-ʦə, pu-ɾi ni kwowsiŋ. knlbaŋan na o **** **kb tnxalun*, kska alaŋ paɾu nan-tu oħija ka llabaŋ balaj, kska kana alaŋ nsgan bbkgan qpaħan alaŋ tajwaŋ o alaŋ nsgan ɟin-aj nii o, ħija ka ʦigtɾu llabaŋ bi. babaw tnɟjalan do ħaŋan alaŋ nsgan ɟin-aj nii o pnjaħan səuxal ħan. pusu bi nniqan bnkgan mqapan alaŋ o ga mniq u-sə, ga mniq ska bi dgijaq, alaŋ nii o paɾu bi jama nija ni ħɾus bi ka nniqan dħa, malu balaj saan ɾmigaw ni qmita. ga kska alaŋ ħija ka səəɟiq na o, niqan əmbgala ni səəɟiq ni bunun.klwaan niħuŋ səuxal, wada muda paɾu balaj tmɟijal niħuŋ siida kasəəɟiq səəɟiq, kika niqan bi ħaŋan'musja ɟikiŋ' əndaan tmɟijal niħuŋ ksun, əndaannii o kikamniq bi alaŋ nsgan ɟin-aj nii. **** ħŋkawas siida, smnəgul tħowlaŋ ku-ku-min-tu ka səəɟiq ipaw, mijaħ tħɟil ʦiŋ-ʦiŋ alaŋ nsgan ɟin-aj ħini(kika alaŋ ɟuŋ-siŋ sajaŋ), mdɾumut bi kmbuɾaħ qmpaħan ka dħija nii, mħuma ana manu ħiji qħuni pnəgalaŋ, pħijug nanak alaŋ dħa, dħija nii o kmgaaw mɾata ni səəɟiq na o pnaaħ jun-nan ʦjukuku ħaɾi kana, kska na ħija niqan ka səəɟiq tnpusu paj-ji pnaaħ jun-nan uɾi. jaasa saw nii do alaŋ nsgan ɟin-aj o mumal ħija ka kndsan paj-ji jun-nan uɾi da. kija ni mtgimax alaŋ ɟiŋ-aj ka lala klgan kndsan səəɟiq da. ɾis alaŋ nsgan ɟin-aj o llabaŋ bi ka dxgal alaŋ nii,bɾaħ naħan o ŋalan dxgal nniqan tnpusu səəɟiq ħan, pusu nniqan mqəəpaħ alaŋ o mniq u sə. **** ħŋkawas siida, tmɟijalmkan niħuŋ ka səəɟiq tnpusu səəɟiq, kika musja ɟikiŋ'(əndaan tmɟijal niħuŋ), wada pskluwi balaj alaŋ tajwaŋ ni ana inu klwaan babaw dxgal. babaw mħudu tmɟijal do, **** ħŋkawas * idas * ɟijax do, ŋalan alaŋnsgan paaħ ħija siida da, kija ni pklwaan alaŋ paɾu taj-ʦuŋ nə-nkaw. paaħ **** ħŋkawas ** idas siida do, klwaan alaŋ paɾu nan-tu da. muda kmpɾijux ħaŋan **** ħŋkawas siida, bukuŋ alaŋ nsgan ɟin-aj nan-tu o pɾaɟiŋ muda dmudul kana alaŋ kmpɾijux ħaŋan alaŋ dħa, dnŋsan nija o tai saw pɾjuxun alaŋ nsgan u-sə ka alaŋ nsgan ɟin-aj nii. duɾi ni, ga ska alaŋ nsgan ħija ka maxal spat(ʦwə-ħwa, ɾi-siŋ, ħwa-sjaŋ, sin-səŋ, ħu-ʦu,nan-ħuŋ, ta-tuŋ, ʦun-jaŋ, ʦiŋ-jiŋ, ħu-ʦu, ʦiŋ-aj, wan-ħuŋ, ħwa-ʦə, ʦuŋ-ʦən) alaŋ bilaq nii o pɾjuxun ħaŋan ida nkaɾi ħniʦi ɾudan səuxal msa. kija ka kija ni jaasa ħaŋan u-sə səuxal o"paɾan"ksun, duma na səəɟiq o ini sɾuwa pɾijux ħaŋan u-sə do ini uda ka əndaan dħa nii da. ida bitaq sajaŋ ida ɟin-aj ka ħaŋan nsgan alaŋ nii. pnəgdxgal knlbanagn alaŋ nsgan ɟin-aj o *,***.**** tnxalun*, mglbu knlbaŋan alaŋ paɾu jun-ɾiŋ, psdkaun kana alaŋ nsgan tajwaŋ o, ħija ka tgtɾu knpɾaan knlbaŋan na, pusu nniqan qmpaħ alaŋ o ga mniq **** tnxalun jama baɾaw. kija ni **** ħŋkawas * idas ** ɟijax siida, daan lmglug *.* kmpɾaan ɾunug ka alaŋ ɟin-aj nii, pusu ɾunug nii o pklu bi mniq tɾuma alaŋ nsgan ɟin-aj, qnɾbqan na o **.* **kb tnxalun*. bnkgan qpaħan alaŋ kana alaŋ o niqan ** ka alaŋ bilaq niqan spat bilaq alaŋ ga mniq tgdaja alaŋ bilaq ɟuŋ-siŋ(jajuŋ pi-ɾwi-si, alaŋ ʦə-jun, pŋpuŋ suŋ-kaŋ), ga mniq sijaw əlug * kana, kska ɾi-san ni ta-juɾiŋ. alaŋ bilaq ʦwə-ħwa(ʦwə-ɾwan , ma-ɾi-kwan/ma-li-koan, ħwa-kaŋ) alaŋ bilaq ɾisiŋ(ɾisiŋ, waŋjaŋ, maɾipa / maləpa) alaŋ bilaq ħwa-sjaŋ(ɟwə-jən / masitobaon, ħuŋ-sjaŋ / kna*i, ʦə-ħuŋ), tɾu alaŋ bilaq nii o ga mniq sijaw əlug ɾi-siŋ kana, uusa dħa qmpaħ qmpaħan. niqan dħa bilaq alaŋ ga mniq ijax tgdaja ɾjaxan ħidaw(jajuŋ pa-kaŋ-si) alaŋ bilaq siŋ-sən(mə-jən / baibalala/bala, ħwə-swin saan tnqħuni) alaŋ ħu-ʦu(ʦuŋ-jən / t-g-da-ja/ nakaħaɾa, ʦiŋ-ɾju /ʦwan-ʦuŋ-taw-sə /gluban) niqan mataɾubilaq alaŋ ga mniq ska alaŋ bilaq nan-ħuŋ(qħuni subus, tmaj uusa qmita qħuni sudus, jajuŋ nan-san-si, mə-si tuŋ-jən/ton-gan, bijuk ɟən-ʦə-kwan) alaŋ bilaq ta-tuŋ(u-sə / pa-ɾan, pi-ħu, ptasan tgska laqi ɟin-aj, ɾu-dux/dɾo-dux, ju-sə / ʦiŋ-ʦiŋ-nuŋ-ʦaŋ, suŋ-kaŋ, mə-ħuŋ / ɾi-jiŋ, ʦwə-ħuŋ, i-ħuŋ, kwən-jaŋ, u-ɾiŋ, ħəħwansan) alaŋ bilaq ʦwən-jaŋ(jiŋ-sə/ snu-wil, ħow-kə / ħo-go, tɾu-wan, ta-ɾu-wan / ta-ɾo-wan) alaŋ bilaq ʦiŋ-jiŋ(ɾu-san / bow-a-lun, ulaj ɾu-san / mħə-bu, twən-jun / tnbalaħ) alaŋ bilaq tu-da(piŋ-ʦiŋ / tu-da/to-da, piŋ-ħə / lukug-daja) alaŋ bilaw ħə-ʦow(ʦiŋ-kwan / tɾuku, piŋ-sən / tɾuwan) niqan spaʦ bilaq alaŋ ga mniq tgħunat alaŋ bilaq ʦiŋ-aj(wan-ta, suŋ-ɾiŋ / pulan, aw-wan-ta) alaŋ bilaq wan-ħuŋ(ʦwi-piŋ, kan-ʦow-wan / kantaban, ʦjə-mə-jwən) alaŋ bilaq ħwa-ʦə(u-ʦjə / *ogai) alaŋ bilaq ʦuŋ-ʦən(ka-tu / kwow-kəŋ / ka-du) pnspuan səəɟiq knpɾjuxan knħbɾagan səəɟiq ħŋkawas kska kana alaŋ nsgan tajwaŋ o, alaŋ nsgan ɟin-aj nii ka ʦigtɾu knlala knħbɾagan səəɟiq n aka alaŋ nii, mgtɾuma knħbɾagan səəɟiq alaŋ paɾu ħwa-lən alaŋ nsgan b-su-ɾiŋ ni alaŋ paɾu nan-tu alaŋ nsgan sin-i. ttgsa ptasan tgaɾaw laqi pnħjugan klwaan patsan slħajan qmpaħ pnəgalaŋ ɟin-aj ptasan tgska laqi pnħjugan alaŋ paɾu nan-tu ptasan tgska laqi ɟin-aj ɾgagan tuɾku pnħjugan klwaan saan ɾmigaw ɾnaaw saan ɾmigaw ħu-ħwan-san pnħjugan klwaan ɾnaaw saan ɾmigaw aw-wan-ta pnħjugan klwaan ʦwə-ħuŋ, i-ħuŋ u-sə tglijan qsija ulaj ɾu-san pnəgalaŋ ʦiŋ-ʦiŋ pnəgalaŋ mə-ħuŋ pnħijug paɾu ptasan taj-ta ɾnaaw ħwə-sjun pnħjugan paɾu ptasan siŋ-ta tajal saan msaŋaj ttgsa əndaan mnəudusalaŋ paɾu nan-tu saan kndamat əndaan u-sə səəɟiq niqan bi ħaŋan mow-na ɾu-daw-klwaan niħuŋ siida, ħija o bukuŋ kana alaŋ səəɟiq ka ħija, ħija o kika pusu bi dnnudul kana səəɟiq səəɟiq mɾmun bi tmɟijal niħuŋ.
